# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Local rule projections (not committed, per-developer)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
local_rules:
  - id: odoo19-coding
    owner: local
    local_projection: ~/.claude/rules/odoo19-coding.md
    repo_source: null  # Derived from upstream Odoo 19 docs, not a repo file
    upstream: https://www.odoo.com/documentation/19.0/contributing/development/coding_guidelines.html
    sync_expectation: manual
    description: Odoo 19 coding conventions — model order, naming, ORM rules, breaking changes

  - id: oca-governance
    owner: local
    local_projection: ~/.claude/rules/oca-governance.md
    repo_source: config/addons.manifest.yaml  # Derived from manifest data
    upstream: https://odoo-community.org/list-of-must-have-oca-modules
    sync_expectation: manual
    description: OCA module maturity gates, quality checklist, adoption thresholds

schema_version: "1.0"
updated_at: "2026-03-15"

n8n_target:
  url: https://n8n.insightpulseai.com
  api_base: /api/v1
  port: 5678

import_policy:
  default_state: disabled  # All imported disabled; enable per-wave
  url_rewrite:
    old: https://spdtwktxdalcfigzeqrz.supabase.co
    new: https://supabase.insightpulseai.com
  credential_rewrite:
    strategy: manual  # Credentials must be re-created on target n8n

enablement_waves:
  - wave: 1
    name: "Health & Control"
    description: "Health checks, monitoring, heartbeat workflows"
    enable_after: "All Phase 5 consumer smoke tests pass"
    workflows:
      # Health checks
      - automations/n8n/workflows/01-health-check.json
      - automations/n8n/workflows/control-plane/health-check-scheduler.json
      # Control plane backup
      - automations/n8n/workflows/control-plane/backup-scheduler.json
      # MCP connection test
      - automations/n8n/workflows/claude-ai-mcp/test/00_mcp_connection_test.json

  - wave: 2
    name: "Read-Only Integrations"
    description: "Workflows that only read from Supabase (dashboards, reports, exports, queries)"
    enable_after: "Wave 1 healthy for 24h"
    workflows:
      # MCP read-only workflows
      - automations/n8n/workflows/claude-ai-mcp/read-only/01_mcp_odoo_query.json
      - automations/n8n/workflows/claude-ai-mcp/read-only/02_mcp_supabase_ops.json
      - automations/n8n/workflows/claude-ai-mcp/read-only/03_mcp_finance_summary.json
      - automations/n8n/workflows/claude-ai-mcp/read-only/04_mcp_infra_health.json
      - automations/n8n/workflows/claude-ai-mcp/read-only/05_mcp_workflow_monitor.json
      - automations/n8n/workflows/claude-ai-mcp/read-only/06_mcp_sync_trigger.json
      # Reporting / cache refresh
      - automations/n8n/workflows/superset-cache-refresh.json
      # Odoo reverse mapper (read-only query)
      - automations/n8n/workflows/odoo_reverse_mapper.json
      # PPM reconciliation (read + compare)
      - automations/n8n/workflows/ppm-clarity-reconciliation.json

finance, HR, and approvals with CE + OCA + ipai_* achieving >= 80% EE parity. parent_objectives: [obj_D, obj_E] key_results: - kr: "EE parity score >= 80% weighted" measurement: "scripts/test_ee_parity.py output" - kr: "BIR filing on-time rate = 100%" kpi_ref: kpi_005 - kr: "Monthly close cycle < 10 business days" kpi_ref: kpi_003 - kr: "All ipai_* modules pass CI gates" measurement: "ci-odoo-ce.yml green on main"

  - id: okr_O3
    name: "Azure-Native AI/Data Maturity"
    description: >
      Progress Databricks workspace maturity through defined phases while
      maintaining agent platform reliability and data governance.
    parent_objectives: [obj_C, obj_E]
    key_results:
      - kr: "Databricks workspace at Phase 1 (shared sandbox) with Unity Catalog"
        measurement: "ssot/databricks/workspace.yaml maturity_phases.current"
      - kr: "Agent tool success rate >= 90%"
        kpi_ref: kpi_012
      - kr: "Copilot response latency P95 < 5s"
        kpi_ref: kpi_013
      - kr: "Medallion pipeline coverage for all finance data"
        measurement: "Databricks catalog table count"

# =============================================================================
# KPI Cross-Reference Index
# =============================================================================
# Maps strategic objectives to operational KPIs defined in
# platform/data/contracts/control_room_kpis.yaml
kpi_index:
  obj_A: [kpi_001, kpi_016, kpi_017]
  obj_B: [kpi_010, kpi_014, kpi_015]
  obj_C: [kpi_007, kpi_008, kpi_011]
  obj_D: [kpi_002, kpi_003, kpi_004]
  obj_E: [kpi_005, kpi_006, kpi_012]

# =============================================================================
# Agent Rules Manifest — Machine-Readable Registry
# =============================================================================
# Maps agent governance rules to their canonical sources and local projections.
# Consumed by: CI validators, agent bootstrap, documentation generators.
#
# Principle: Repo artifacts are SSOT. Local files are projections.
# If a local rule contradicts a repo artifact, the repo artifact wins.
# =============================================================================

& Compliance" description: > Achieve 100% on-time BIR filing, maintain tax reconciliation accuracy, and ensure agent platform reliability for compliance workflows. key_results: - kr: "BIR filing on-time rate = 100% (kpi_005)" kpi_ref: kpi_005 - kr: "Tax reconciliation variance < 0.1% (kpi_006)" kpi_ref: kpi_006 - kr: "Agent tool success rate >= 90% (kpi_012)" kpi_ref: kpi_012 # ============================================================================= # Canonical OKR Stack (O1-O3) # ============================================================================= canonical_okrs:

  - id: okr_O1
    name: "Governed Engineering Control Plane"
    description: >
      Establish a fully governed engineering control plane where all repos,
      CI/CD, infrastructure, and integrations are SSOT-managed, observable,
      and audit-trailed.
    parent_objectives: [obj_A, obj_B]
    key_results:
      - kr: "9 active repos classified by 5-layer model with CODEOWNERS"
        measurement: "ssot/github/desired-end-state.yaml org_layers coverage"
      - kr: "3 org-level GitHub Projects operational (Roadmap, Board, Backlog)"
        measurement: "GitHub Projects API query"
      - kr: "CI green rate sustained >= 95%"
        kpi_ref: kpi_017
      - kr: "All SSOT YAML files validated by CI on every push"
        measurement: "Workflow pass rate for *-ssot-gate.yml"

  - id: okr_O2
    name: "Odoo as Governed Runtime"
    description: >
      Position Odoo CE 19 as the governed ERP runtime for finance, HR, and
      approvals with CE + OCA + ipai_* achieving >= 80% EE parity.
    parent_objectives: [obj_D, obj_E]
    key_results:
      - kr: "EE parity score >= 80% weighted"
        measurement: "scripts/test_ee_parity.py output"
      - kr: "BIR filing on-time rate = 100%"
        kpi_ref: kpi_005
      - kr: "Monthly close cycle < 10 business days"
        kpi_ref: kpi_003
      - kr: "All ipai_* modules pass CI gates"
        measurement: "ci-odoo-ce.yml green on main"
